forum.spacePharmacistsDesc: Professional discussions for verified pharmacists only
forum.spacePatientsDesc: Ask your questions, a verified pharmacist will answer

disclaimer: Information shared on this forum does not replace an in-person medical or pharmaceutical consultation.

home.hero_subtitle: BuonaPharma designs, manufactures and distributes medicines, health products and cosmetics from Yaoundé, serving pharmacies and patients across Cameroon.
home.pillar1_title: A laboratory built on international standards
home.pillar1_text: Our teams apply rigorous manufacturing standards, from raw material quality control through to final distribution.
home.pillar2_text: Our pharmacists stay in constant dialogue with healthcare professionals to keep our ranges aligned with real needs on the ground.
home.pillar3_text: Every year we invest in our production capacity and scientific expertise to strengthen access to quality care in Cameroon.
home.trust_forum: Forum open to pharmacists and patients
home.forum_preview_empty_title: Be the first to join the conversation

about.title: About BuonaPharma
about.intro: BuonaPharma is a pharmaceutical laboratory based in Yaoundé, specializing in the manufacture and distribution of generic medicines, health supplements and cosmetic products.
about.mission_text: To make reliable, quality health products accessible to pharmacies and patients alike — manufactured and controlled to strict standards, at prices suited to the local market.
about.quality_text: Every batch is checked at each stage, from raw material intake to market release, in line with applicable pharmaceutical regulations.
about.team_text: A team of pharmacists, laboratory technicians and healthcare professionals, committed daily to the design and quality control of our products.

products.title: Our products
products.intro: Three complementary ranges, designed to meet the needs of pharmacies and patients.
products.pharma_text: A range of generic medicines covering pharmacies' everyday needs, manufactured according to good manufacturing practice standards.
products.health_text: Everyday support products: iron, magnesium, vitamins and folic acid, to support the health of the whole family.
products.cosmetics_text: A range of body care products — shower gels and intimate hygiene care — formulated to respect sensitive skin.

partners.title: Become a partner
partners.text: We are always looking for new partners and investors to support our growth.
partners.cta_text: Interested in investing or collaborating with BuonaPharma? Write to us with your profile and motivations — we'll get back to you promptly.

careers.title: Careers
careers.text: Join a team committed to health in Cameroon. We regularly recruit passionate professionals — pharmacists, technicians, sales staff.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.text: A question, an order, a partnership? Our team is here to help.

footer.address: Rond point Damas, BP 16588 Yaoundé, Cameroon
